warscrolls.name: Argent Shard
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Faction Terrain, Ward (6+), Chaos, Disciples of Tzeentch

abilities.name: Sorcerous Duplication
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Movement Phase
abilities.effect:
Pick 1 of the following effects:

• If there is only 1 friendly **Argent Shard** on the battlefield, set up another **Argent Shard** wholly within 12" of this terrain feature, more than 1" from all other terrain features, more than 3" from all objectives and more than 9" from all enemy units.

• Remove this terrain feature from the battlefield and set it up again on the battlefield more than 1" from all other terrain features, more than 3" from all objectives and more than 9" from all enemy units.

abilities.name: Magical Focus
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Hero Phase
abilities.effect: The next time a friendly **DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH** unit uses a **SPELL** ability this phase, when picking targets for that spell, you can measure range and visibility from this terrain feature instead of from the caster, and your opponent can measure range and visibility to this terrain feature instead of to the caster for the purposes of the ‘Unbind’ ability.

warscrolls.loadout:
The following universal terrain abilities apply to this terrain feature (Terrain, 1.2):
Cover, Impassable

warscrolls.name: Blue Horrors and Brimstone Horrors
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Infantry, Ward (6+), Chaos, Disciples of Tzeentch, Daemon

abilities.name: Split Again
abilities.effect:
Roll a dice for each Blue Horror model in this unit that is slain. On a 3+, you can add 1 Brimstone Horrors model to this unit.

**Designer’s Note:** *You cannot have more than 10 Blue Horror models and 10 Brimstone Horrors models in a non-reinforced unit. You cannot have more than 20 Blue Horror models and 20 Brimstone Horrors models in a reinforced unit.*

*Models that have been slain and returned to this unit do not count as being slain for the purposes of this ability.*

warscrolls.loadout:
This unit starts the battle with 10 Blue Horror models or, if it is a reinforced unit, 20 Blue Horror models.

Brimstone Horrors models can be added to this unit using the ‘Split Again’ ability.

warscrolls.name: Burning Chariot of Tzeentch
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: War Machine, Fly, Ward (6+), Chaos, Disciples of Tzeentch, Daemon

melee.name: Flaming Maws and Blue Horrors’ Jabs

abilities.name: Fiery Death From Above
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Charge Phase
abilities.declare: If this unit charged this turn, pick a visible enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.
abilities.effect:
Roll a D3. On a 1, gain 1 **fate point**. On a 2+:
• Inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
• This unit can immediately use a **RETREAT** ability as if it were your movement phase. No mortal damage is inflicted on this unit by that **RETREAT** ability.

warscrolls.name: Burning Sigil of Tzeentch
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Manifestation, Endless Spell, Ward (6+), Chaos, Disciples of Tzeentch

abilities.name: Radiant Transmogrification
abilities.declare: This **MANIFESTATION** must use this ability in each hero phase. Pick each unit (friendly and enemy) within 9" of this **MANIFESTATION** to be the targets.
abilities.effect:
Roll 2 dice, pick either result, then apply the corresponding effect for the rest of the turn:
1: No effect.
2-3:  **Heal (D3)** each friendly **DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH** target. Inflict D3 mortal damage on each enemy target.
4: Friendly **DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH** targets can use **CHARGE** abilities even if they used a **RUN** ability in the same turn. Enemy targets cannot use **RUN** abilities.
5- Add 1 to hit rolls for attacks made by friendly **DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH** targets. Subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks made by enemy targets.
6- Add 1 to wound rolls for attacks made by friendly **DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH** targets. Subtract 1 from wound rolls for attacks made by enemy targets.

warscrolls.name: Changecaster, Herald of Tzeentch
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Wizard (1), Infantry, Ward (6+), Chaos, Disciples of Tzeentch, Daemon

melee.name: Staff of Change and Ritual Dagger

abilities.name: Weapon Curse
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase
abilities.declare: Pick a visible friendly **DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH DAEMON** unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a dice. Add 1 to the roll if the target was set up this turn. On a 3+, until the start of your next turn, other than the **Companion** weapon ability, weapon abilities for attacks that target that unit have no effect.

abilities.name: Locus of Command
abilities.effect: Each time a friendly **DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH DAEMON** unit wholly within 12" of this unit uses the ‘Rally’ command, you can make 3 additional rally rolls of D6.

warscrolls.notes: This HERO can join an eligible regiment as a Tzeentchian Deceiver.

warscrolls.name: Chaos Spawn of Tzeentch
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Beast, Chaos, Disciples of Tzeentch

abilities.name: Beast
abilities.effect: This unit has a maximum control score of 1.

abilities.name: Waves of Mutation
abilities.effect: Each time this unit or the replacement of this unit is destroyed, set up a replacement unit in reserve **masked by illusion.** Each friendly **Chaos Spawn of Tzeentch** unit can be replaced any number of times.

abilities.name: A Twisted Fate
abilities.declare: This unit must be deployed using this ability
abilities.effect: Set up this unit in reserve **masked by illusion**. It has now been deployed.

warscrolls.name: Curseling, Eye of Tzeentch
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Wizard (2), Infantry, Chaos, Disciples of Tzeentch, Arcanite

melee.name: Staff of Tzeentch and Blazing Sword

abilities.name: Armour-Bane Curse
abilities.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of this unit to be the target. Then, make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect: Subtract 1 from save rolls for combat attacks that target that unit until the start of your next turn.

abilities.name: With Spell and Sword
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
abilities.effect: If this unit is in combat, it can use a non-**SUMMON SPELL** ability as if it were your hero phase, as if that ability had the **UNLIMITED** keyword and as if this unit had not cast any spells this turn.

warscrolls.notes: This HERO can join an eligible regiment as an Arcanite Cabalist.

warscrolls.name: Daemonic Simulacrum
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Manifestation, Endless Spell, Fly, Ward (6+), Chaos, Disciples of Tzeentch

abilities.name: Jaws of Fate
abilities.effect: Add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s **Snapping Jaws** for each **fate point** you have.

summonedBy.lore: The Oracles of Fate Manifestation Lore

warscrolls.name: Ephilim's Pandaemonium
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Unique, Wizard (1), Infantry, Champion, Ward (6+), Chaos, Disciples of Tzeentch, Daemon

abilities.name: Keeper of the Pandaemonium
abilities.effect: You can return D3 slain models to this unit.

abilities.name: Power Leech
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn, Any Shooting Phase
abilities.effect: Roll a D3. Allocate a number of damage points to this unit equal to the roll (ward rolls cannot be made for those damage points). Then, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s ranged weapons for the rest of the turn.

warscrolls.loadout:
Each model in this unit is armed with Warping Wyrdfire and Daemonic Talons. The models in this unit are:

• Ephilim the Unknowable (champion)
• Spawnmaw
• Flamespooler
• Kindlefinger
• Apo’trax, the Starefysh

warscrolls.name: Exalted Flamer of Tzeentch
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Infantry, Fly, Ward (6+), Chaos, Disciples of Tzeentch, Daemon

abilities.name: Unnatural Heat
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Shooting Phase
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit that was targeted by this unit’s shooting attacks this phase to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a dice. Add the number of damage points allocated to the target this phase by this unit’s shooting attacks to the roll. On a 5+, subtract 1 from save rolls for the target for the rest of the turn.

abilities.name: Heart of the Inferno
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Shooting Phase
abilities.declare: Pick up to 2 visible friendly **FLAMERS OF TZEENTCH** units wholly within 12" of this unit to be the targets.
abilities.effect: Add 1 to wound rolls for the targets’ shooting attacks for the rest of the turn.

warscrolls.name: Eyes of the Nine
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Unique, Infantry, Champion, Chaos, Disciples of Tzeentch, Arcanite

abilities.name: Brimstone Horror
abilities.effect: This unit’s **Brimstone Horror** is a token. When this unit’s **Blue Horror** is slain, place this unit’s **Brimstone Horror** on the battlefield. Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of this unit’s **Mighty Sorcerous Bolt** while its **Brimstone Horror** is on the battlefield. If you make an unmodified save roll of 1 for this unit, remove this unit’s **Brimstone Horror** from the battlefield.

abilities.name: Vortemis the All-seeing
abilities.effect: While this unit’s **Vortemis the All-seeing** is on the battlefield, it has **WIZARD (1)**.

warscrolls.loadout:
Each model in this unit is armed with a Mighty Sorcerous Bolt and Arcanite Weapons. The models in this unit are:

• Vortemis the All-seeing (champion)
• K’charik
• Narvia
• Turosh
• Blue Horror

warscrolls.name: Fatemaster
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Wizard (1), Infantry, Chaos, Disciples of Tzeentch, Arcanite

abilities.name: Long in the Planning
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Enemy Hero Phase
abilities.declare: Spend 2 **fate points**. Then, pick a visible friendly Arcanite unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: For the rest of the turn, the first time an enemy unit ends a charge move within 3" of the target, you can remove the target from the battlefield and set it up in reserve **masked by illusion**.

abilities.name: Bound Retinue
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase
abilities.declare: This unit can only use this ability if it is **masked by illusion**. Pick up to 1 other friendly unit that is **masked by illusion** to be the target.
abilities.effect: Set up this unit on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units. Then, set up the target wholly within 6" of this unit and more than 9" from all enemy units.

warscrolls.notes: This HERO can join an eligible regiment as an Arcanite Cabalist.

warscrolls.name: Fatemaster on Disc of Tzeentch
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Cavalry, Fly, Chaos, Disciples of Tzeentch, Arcanite, Disc of Tzeentch

abilities.name: Soulbound Shield
abilities.phaseDetails: Reaction: Opponent declared a SPELL ability
abilities.effect: If this unit was picked to be the target of that spell, roll a dice. On a 4+, ignore the effect of that spell on this unit. This unit can use this ability more than once per phase but only once per **SPELL** ability.

abilities.name: Lord of Fate
abilities.effect: Add 1 to wound rolls for attacks made by friendly **ARCANITE** units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.

warscrolls.name: Fateskimmer, Herald of Tzeentch on Burning Chariot
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, War Machine, Wizard (1), Fly, Ward (6+), Chaos, Disciples of Tzeentch, Daemon

melee.name: Staff of Change and Ritual Dagger

abilities.name: Spread the Inferno
abilities.effect: Companion weapons used by friendly **DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH** units have **Crit (2 Hits)** while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.

abilities.name: Fuel for the Flames
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Hero Phase
abilities.declare: Pick a visible friendly **DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH** unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: If the target is destroyed this turn, before removing it from play, gain 1 **fate point**.

warscrolls.name: Flamers of Tzeentch
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Infantry, Champion, Fly, Ward (6+), Chaos, Disciples of Tzeentch, Daemon

abilities.name: Lingering Burns
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn
abilities.declare: This unit can use this ability even if it has been destroyed. Pick any number of **BURNING** enemy units to be the targets.
abilities.effect: Roll a D3 for each target. On a 1, the target no longer has the **BURNING** keyword. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.

abilities.name: Capricious Wyrdflame
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Shooting Phase
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit that had any damage points allocated to it this turn by this unit’s shooting attacks to be the target.
abilities.effect: The target has the **BURNING** keyword for the rest of the battle.

warscrolls.name: Fluxmaster, Herald of Tzeentch on Disc
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Wizard (1), Cavalry, Fly, Ward (6+), Chaos, Disciples of Tzeentch, Daemon, Disc of Tzeentch

melee.name: Staff of Change and Ritual Dagger

abilities.name: Arcane Tome
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: You declared a SPELL ability for this unit
abilities.effect: Re-roll 1 of the dice in the casting roll.

warscrolls.name: Gaunt Summoner
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Wizard (2), Infantry, Ward (5+), Chaos, Disciples of Tzeentch, Daemon

abilities.name: All Belongs to Tzeentch
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle (Army), Start of Any Turn
abilities.declare: Pick an objective you do not control and that you controlled earlier in the battle to be the target.
abilities.effect: You control the target objective.

abilities.name: Leaden Limbs
abilities.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect:
Effect: Until the start of your next turn:

• Halve the target’s Move characteristic.
• The effects of the ‘Fly’ ability do not apply to the target.

abilities.name: Masters of the Silver Towers
abilities.effect: Enemy units cannot end a charge move within 1/2" of a friendly **Argent Shard** that is wholly within 12" of this unit and was set up on the battlefield in the same turn.

warscrolls.name: Gaunt Summoner on Disc of Tzeentch
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Wizard (2), Cavalry, Fly, Ward (5+), Chaos, Disciples of Tzeentch, Daemon

abilities.name: All Belongs to Tzeentch
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle (Army), Start of Any Turn
abilities.declare: Pick an objective you do not control and that you controlled earlier in the battle to be the target.
abilities.effect: You control the target objective.

abilities.name: Masters of the Silver Towers
abilities.effect: Enemy units cannot end a charge move within 1/2" of a friendly **Argent Shard** that is wholly within 12" of this unit and was set up on the battlefield in the same turn.

abilities.name: Arcane Imprisonment
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy **HERO** in combat with this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect: If the unmodified casting roll exceeds the target’s Health characteristic, it is automatically destroyed and cannot be replaced for the rest of the battle.

warscrolls.name: Jade Obelisk
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Infantry, Champion (1/9), Chaos, Disciples of Tzeentch, Arcanite

abilities.name: Silver Monoliths
abilities.effect: Subtract 1 from the Rend characteristic of weapons used for attacks that target this unit while it is wholly within 12" of a friendly **Argent Shard**.

abilities.name: Chosen by the Stone
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Shooting Phase
abilities.declare: If this unit has any models carrying an **Antithete Bow**, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect:
Roll a dice. On a 3+, place the **Idolarcs** of all other friendly **Jade Obelisk** units next to their respective units. Then, place this unit’s **Idolarc** next to the target.

While a friendly **Idolarc** is next to an enemy unit, subtract 1" from that enemy unit’s Move characteristic for each **fate point** you have. This ability cannot reduce an enemy unit’s Move characteristic below half its unmodified value.

abilities.name: Idolarc
abilities.effect: This unit’s **Idolarc** is a token. After setting up this unit on the battlefield for the first time, place its **Idolarc** next to it.

warscrolls.loadout:
Each model in this unit is armed with Passive Mason’s Tools.
•  4/9 models can carry an Antithete Bow.
•  The champion cannot carry an Antithete Bow.

warscrolls.name: Kairic Acolytes
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Infantry, Champion, Chaos, Disciples of Tzeentch, Arcanite

abilities.name: Driven by Destiny
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Enemy Movement Phase
abilities.effect: If this unit is more than 6" from all enemy units, it can move **X**", where **X** is the number of **fate points** you have. It cannot move into combat during any part of that move.

warscrolls.name: Kairos Fateweaver
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Warmaster, Unique, Hero, Monster, Wizard (3), Fly, Ward (5+), Chaos, Disciples of Tzeentch, Daemon

abilities.name: Battle Damaged
abilities.effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, subtract 1 from its power level.

abilities.name: Fateful Reverse
abilities.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect:
Until the start of your next turn:
• If the target charged in the same turn, friendly **DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH** units in combat with the target have Strike‑first.
• The target’s weapons cannot be affected by the **CHARGE (+1 DAMAGE)** weapon ability.

abilities.name: Beacon of Sorcery
abilities.effect:
Add 1 to casting rolls and unbinding rolls for friendly **DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH WIZARDS** while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.

In addition, if a friendly **DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH WIZARD** wholly within 12" of this unit unbinds a spell, no command points are spent for that **WIZARD** to use the ‘Magical Intervention’ command in that phase.

abilities.name: Master of Destiny
abilities.effect:
If this unit has not already **engineered the outcome** this battle round, instead of making a casting roll, unbinding roll, banishment roll, hit roll, wound roll or save roll for a visible friendly **DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH** unit wholly within 12" of this unit, this unit can **engineer the outcome**.

If the roll would have been a D6 roll, you can use a value of 6 for it that cannot be modified. If the roll would have been a 2D6 roll, you can use a value of 9 for it that cannot be modified.

abilities.name: Mastery of Magic
abilities.effect: When you make a casting roll for this unit, you can change the lowest D6 to match the highest D6.

warscrolls.name: Lord of Change
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Monster, Wizard (3), Fly, Ward (5+), Chaos, Disciples of Tzeentch, Daemon

abilities.name: Battle Damaged
abilities.effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, subtract 1 from its power level.

abilities.name: Temporal Manipulation
abilities.declare: Pick another visible friendly **DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH** unit that was not set up this turn and that is wholly within 18" of this unit to be the target. Then, make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect: The target can use the ‘Normal Move’ ability as if it were your movement phase, but it must end that move closer to this unit.

abilities.name: Summon Daemons of Tzeentch
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase
abilities.declare: Pick a friendly non‑**HERO DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH DAEMON** unit that has been destroyed to be the target.
abilities.effect: Set up a replacement unit with half the number of models from the target unit (rounding up) wholly within 12" of this unit and more than 9" from all enemy units.

abilities.name: Locus of Impossibility
abilities.effect: Add 1 to casting rolls for this unit. In addition, subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks that target friendly **DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH DAEMON** units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.

warscrolls.name: Magister
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Wizard (1), Infantry, Chaos, Disciples of Tzeentch, Arcanite

abilities.name: Imbued With Arcane Fire
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
abilities.declare: Pick a visible friendly **ARCANITE** unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: The target’s melee weapons have **Crit (Mortal)** until the start of your next turn.

abilities.name: Spellmaster
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: You declared a **SPELL** ability for a **WIZARD** within 30" of this unit and the casting roll equalled or exceeded the spell’s casting value and that spell has not been unbound
abilities.effect:
Make an unbinding roll of 2D6. If the roll exceeds the casting roll for the spell, the spell is unbound and its effect is not resolved.

If the spell is unbound, add 1 to casting rolls for this unit for the rest of the phase.

warscrolls.notes: This HERO can join an eligible regiment as an Arcanite Cabalist.

warscrolls.name: Magister on Disc of Tzeentch
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Wizard (1), Cavalry, Fly, Chaos, Disciples of Tzeentch, Arcanite

abilities.name: Fates Converge
abilities.effect: While you have 6 or more **fate points**, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons used by friendly **ARCANITE** units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.

abilities.name: Spellmaster
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: You declared a **SPELL** ability for a **WIZARD** within 30" of this unit and the casting roll equalled or exceeded the spell’s casting value and that spell has not been unbound
abilities.effect:
Make an unbinding roll of 2D6. If the roll exceeds the casting roll for the spell, the spell is unbound and its effect is not resolved.

If the spell is unbound, add 1 to casting rolls for this unit for the rest of the phase.

warscrolls.name: Ogroid Thaumaturge
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Wizard (1), Infantry, Ward (6+), Chaos, Disciples of Tzeentch, Arcanite

abilities.name: Thaumaturge Hunger
abilities.phaseDetails: Reaction: Opponent declared a **SPELL** ability for a unit within 30" of this unit
abilities.effect: This unit can move 6". It can move into combat and must end that move closer to the caster. If this unit was in combat at the start of the move, it must end that move in combat.

abilities.name: Arcane Absorption
abilities.effect:
If any damage points were allocated to an enemy **WIZARD** or **PRIEST** by this unit’s attacks this turn and that enemy unit has been destroyed:

• **Heal (7)** this unit.
• Add 1 to this unit’s power level for the rest of the battle.

This unit can be affected by this ability multiple times and the effects are cumulative.

warscrolls.notes: This HERO can join an eligible regiment as an Arcanite Cabalist.

warscrolls.name: Pink Horrors
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Infantry, Champion, Musician (1/10), Standard Bearer (1/10), Ward (6+), Chaos, Disciples of Tzeentch, Daemon

abilities.name: Lunatic Demise
abilities.effect:
Each time a model in this unit is slain, before removing the model from play, pick 1 of the following effects:

***Split:*** Pick a visible friendly **Blue Horrors and Brimstone Horrors** unit within 12" of this unit. Return up to 2 slain **Blue Horror** models to that unit.

***Petty Vengeance:*** Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target, then roll a dice. On a 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.

warscrolls.name: Scourge of Ghyran Kairic Acolytes
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Infantry, Champion, Chaos, Disciples of Tzeentch, Arcanite

abilities.name: Empowered By Magic
abilities.effect: Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of this unit’s melee weapons while this unit is wholly within 12" of any **MANIFESTATIONS** (friendly or enemy).

abilities.name: Vulcharc
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Shooting Phase
abilities.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to the Rend characteristic of melee weapons used by friendly **Kairic Acolytes** units for attacks that target that enemy unit.

warscrolls.notes: This unit is legal for Matched Play for battles fought using the General’s Handbook 2025-26 battlepack.

warscrolls.name: Scourge of Ghyran Ogroid Thaumaturge
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Wizard (1), Infantry, Chaos, Disciples of Tzeentch, Arcanite

abilities.name: Soul-Deep Devotion
abilities.effect:
While this unit is within a friendly non-**HERO ARCANITE** unit’s combat range:

• This unit has **WARD (4+)**.
• Each time you make a successful ward roll for this unit, allocate 1 damage point to a friendly non-**HERO ARCANITE** unit within this unit’s combat range after the damage sequence for this unit has been resolved (ward rolls cannot be made for those damage points).

abilities.name: Wrath of the Thaumaturge
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Charge Phase
abilities.declare: If this unit is not in combat, pick a friendly **ARCANITE** unit in combat to be the target.
abilities.effect: Remove this unit from the battlefield and set it up again within 1" of the target and in combat. This unit has charged.

warscrolls.notes:
This HERO can join an eligible regiment as an Arcanite Cabalist.
This unit is legal for Matched Play for battles fought using the General’s Handbook 2025-26 battlepack.

warscrolls.name: Screamers of Tzeentch
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Beast, Fly, Ward (6+), Chaos, Disciples of Tzeentch, Daemon

abilities.name: Beast
abilities.effect: This unit has a maximum control score of 1.

abilities.name: Drawn to Magic
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Charge Phase
abilities.declare: If this unit is not in combat, pick an enemy **MANIFESTATION** to be the target. Then, make a charge roll of 3D6.
abilities.effect:
This unit can move a distance up to the value of the charge roll. It can move through the combat ranges of enemy units and must end that move within 1/2" of the target. If it does so, this unit has charged.

Then, if this unit charged this turn, inflict D3 mortal damage on each enemy **MANIFESTATION** in combat with this unit.

warscrolls.name: The Blue Scribes
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Unique, Hero, Wizard (1), Cavalry, Fly, Ward (6+), Chaos, Disciples of Tzeentch, Daemon, Disc of Tzeentch

abilities.name: Treacherous Bond
abilities.declare: Pick a friendly unit within this unit’s combat range to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect:
Until the start of your next turn:

• This unit has **WARD (4+)**.
• Each time you make an unmodified ward roll of 1-3 for this unit, allocate 1 damage point to the target.

abilities.name: Scrolls of Sorcery
abilities.effect: The next time this unit uses a non‑**SUMMON SPELL** ability this phase, do not make a casting roll as part of that ability. Instead, roll a dice. On a 2+, the spell is successfully cast and cannot be unbound.

warscrolls.name: The Changeling
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Unique, Hero, Wizard (2), Infantry, Ward (5+), Chaos, Disciples of Tzeentch, Daemon

abilities.name: Puckish Misdirection
abilities.effect: While they are wholly within 12" of this unit, friendly **DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH** units can use the ‘Redeploy’ command even if they were set up in the same turn.

abilities.name: Whispers of Treachery
abilities.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect: Roll a dice for each model in the target unit. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.

abilities.name: Arch-Deceiver
abilities.declare: This unit can only use this ability if it is **masked by illusion**. Pick a model in a friendly **DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH** unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: This unit can immediately use a **SPELL** ability. When it does so, measure the range and visibility of that **SPELL** ability from the target. The target is treated as the caster for the purpose of other abilities such as ‘Unbind’.

warscrolls.notes: This HERO can join an eligible regiment as a Tzeentchian Deceiver.

warscrolls.name: Tome of Eyes
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Manifestation, Endless Spell, Ward (6+), Chaos, Disciples of Tzeentch

abilities.name: Compendium of Dark Knowledge
abilities.declare: Pick a visible friendly **DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH WIZARD** within 3" of this Manifestation to be the target.
abilities.effect:
The target can immediately use a **SPELL** ability from the Lore of Change or the Lore of Fate.

**Designer’s Note:** *That spell does not count towards the number of* **SPELL** *or* **BANISH** *abilities the target can use this phase.*

summonedBy.lore: The Oracles of Fate Manifestation Lore

warscrolls.name: Tzaangor Enlightened
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Cavalry, Champion, Fly, Chaos, Disciples of Tzeentch, Arcanite, Warflock

abilities.name: All Too Predictable
abilities.effect:
If this unit charged this turn, pick 1 of the following effects to apply for the rest of the turn:

• This unit’s **Tzeentchian Spear and Vicious Beak** has **Crit (2 Hits)**.
• Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of this unit’s **Tzeentchian Spear and Vicious Beak**.

warscrolls.notes: Previously Tzaangor Enlightened on Discs of Tzeentch.

warscrolls.name: Tzaangor Enlightened on Foot
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Champion, Infantry, Chaos, Disciples of Tzeentch, Arcanite, Warflock

abilities.name: Vicious Protectors

warscrolls.notes:
Previously Tzaangor Enlightened.
This unit will move to Warhammer Legends on 1 June 2027

warscrolls.name: Tzaangor Shaman
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Wizard (1), Cavalry, Fly, Chaos, Disciples of Tzeentch, Arcanite, Warflock

melee.name: Staff of Change and Ritual Dagger

abilities.name: Wit of Beasts
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
abilities.declare: Pick a visible enemy **MONSTER** or **CAVALRY** unit within 6" of this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: The target’s melee weapons have the **Companion** weapon ability for the rest of the turn.

abilities.name: Avian Swiftness
abilities.declare: Pick a visible friendly **ARCANITE** unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, until the start of your next turn, the target can use **CHARGE** abilities even if it used a **RUN** ability in the same turn.

warscrolls.name: Tzaangor Skyfires
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Cavalry, Champion, Fly, Chaos, Disciples of Tzeentch, Arcanite, Warflock

abilities.name: Destined Quarry
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit that had any damage points allocated to it by this unit’s attacks this phase to be the target.
abilities.effect: Add 1 to hit rolls for combat attacks made by friendly **WARFLOCK** units that target that enemy unit for the rest of the turn.

abilities.name: Guided by the Future
abilities.effect: Ignore negative modifiers to hit rolls and wound rolls for this unit’s shooting attacks.

warscrolls.name: Tzaangors
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Infantry, Champion, Musician (1/10), Standard Bearer (1/10), Chaos, Disciples of Tzeentch, Arcanite, Warflock

abilities.name: Eldritch Raiders
abilities.effect: Add 1 to wound rolls for this unit’s attacks while it is wholly within enemy territory.

rules.name: Inevitable Ending
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Start of Any Turn
rules.declare: Pick a unit (friendly or enemy) to be the target.
rules.effect: If the target is destroyed this turn, gain 1 **fate point**.

rules.name: Hideous Unpredictability
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase
rules.declare: Pick a friendly unit that is **masked by illusion** to be the target.
rules.effect: Set up the target wholly within 6" of a battlefield edge and more than 9" from all enemy units.

rules.name: Twist of Fate
rules.effect:
Each time a friendly **DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH** unit uses an ability that requires you to spend 1 or more **fate points**, after that ability has been resolved, roll a dice. On a 4+, gain 1 **fate point**.

If you remove 1 or more damage points from the damage pool of a friendly **DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH** unit as a result of the ‘Destined to Serve’ ability, after the damage sequence for that unit has been resolved, roll a dice. On a 4+, gain 1 **fate point**.

rules.name: Symbiotic Madness
rules.effect: Friendly **ARCANITE** units’ melee weapons have **Crit (2 Hits)** while they are wholly within 12" of a friendly **DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH DAEMON** unit.

rules.name: Sorcerers of War
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Combat Phase
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH WIZARD** that is in combat to be the target.
rules.effect: The target can use a non-**SUMMON SPELL** ability as if it were your hero phase, but only the caster or enemy units in combat with the caster can be picked to be the targets of that **SPELL** ability.

rules.name: Cometh the Hour
rules.effect: If you make a charge roll of 9+ for a friendly **DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH** unit, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of that unit’s melee weapons for the rest of the turn.

spells.name: Fold Reality
spells.declare: Pick a **DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH WIZARD** to cast this spell, then you can pick a friendly non-**MONSTER DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH** unit wholly within 12" of the caster to be the target. Then, make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect:
Set the target up in reserve **masked by illusion.** Then, you can pick a friendly unit that is **masked by illusion** and set it up wholly within 12" of the caster or a friendly **Argent Shard** and more than 9" from all enemy units.

**Designer’s Note:** *Both parts of the effect are optional; you can carry out either part or both.*

spells.name: Transformed to Spawn
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on the target. If any models are slain by this ability, you can pick a friendly **CHAOS SPAWN OF TZEENTCH** unit that is **masked by illusion** and set it up on the battlefield in combat with the target and not in combat with any other enemy units.

spells.name: Bolt of Tzeentch
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them that has not been picked to be the target of this spell this turn to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on the target. Subtract 1 from wound rolls for the target’s attacks until the start of your next turn.

spells.name: Shield of Fate
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly **DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH** unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect:
Until the start of your next turn:
• ﻿﻿The target has **WARD (5+)**.
﻿﻿• Subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks that target that unit.

spells.name: Infernal Gateway
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them that has not been picked to be the target of this spell this turn to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Roll either 5 dice or a number of dice equal to the number of **fate points** you have. For each 4+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.

spells.name: Wyrdflame Haze
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH WIZARD** to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Until the start of your next turn, friendly **DISCIPLES OF TEENTCH** units are not visible to enemy units more than 12" from them while those friendly units are wholly within 12" of a friendly **DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH** unit that was set up in the same turn.

spells.name: Summon Tome of Eyes
spells.declare: If there is not a friendly **Tome of Eyes** on the battlefield, pick a friendly **DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH WIZARD** to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Set up a **Tome of Eyes** wholly within 18" of the caster, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units.

spells.name: Summon Burning Sigil of Tzeentch
spells.declare: If there is not a friendly **Burning Sigil of Tzeentch** on the battlefield, pick a friendly **DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH WIZARD** to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Set up a **Burning Sigil of Tzeentch** wholly within 18" of the caster and visible to them.

spells.name: Summon Daemonic Simulacrum
spells.declare: If there is not a friendly **Daemonic Simulacrum** on the battlefield, pick a friendly **DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH WIZARD T**o cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Set up a **Daemonic Simulacrum** wholly within 12" of the caster, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units.

artefacts.name: Spell-Eater Pendant
artefacts.effect: Each time this unit unbinds a spell or banishes an enemy **MANIFESTATION**, gain 1 **fate point**.

artefacts.name: Corrupted Leystone
artefacts.effect: If this unit is contesting an objective, remove it from the battlefield and set it up again contesting an objective and more than 7" from all enemy units.

artefacts.name: Fate Slicer
artefacts.effect: Gain 1 **fate point** if any models were slain by this unit this turn.

artefacts.name: Cloaked in Wyrdflame
artefacts.effect: Subtract 1 from wound rolls for attacks that target this unit.

artefacts.name: Kairic Tome
artefacts.phaseDetails: Reaction: You declared a **SPELL** ability for a **DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH** unit wholly within 6" of this unit
artefacts.effect: Add 1 to or subtract 1 from the casting roll for that spell. This unit can use this ability more than once per phase but only once per **SPELL** ability.

artefacts.name: Mutating Blade
artefacts.effect: Pick 1 of this unit’s melee weapons. That weapon’s Attacks characteristic is 2D6 for the rest of the battle.

artefacts.name: Arcane Siphon
artefacts.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase
artefacts.declare: Pick a visible **MANIFESTATION** (friendly or enemy) that was not set up this turn and is within 12" of this unit to be the target.
artefacts.effect:
Roll a dice. On a 3+:
• The target is banished.
• **Heal (X)** this unit, where **X** is the target’s Health characteristic.

artefacts.name: Spell-Catcher Amulet
artefacts.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase
artefacts.declare: This unit can use this ability if any enemy **MANIFESTATIONS** were banished this phase.
artefacts.effect: This unit can use a **SUMMON** ability from the manifestation lore you picked during army composition. That **SUMMON** ability does not count towards the total number of **SPELL** or **BANISH** abilities this unit can use this phase.

heroicTraits.name: Call of Anarchy
heroicTraits.declare: Pick a terrain feature within 18" of this unit, then pick a friendly non-**HERO CHANGE-CULT** unit that is **masked by illusion** or that has been destroyed to be the target.
heroicTraits.effect:
If you picked a unit that is **masked by illusion**, set it up wholly within 3" of that terrain feature and more than 6" from all enemy units.

If you picked a unit that has been destroyed, set up a replacement unit with half the number of models from the target unit (rounding up) wholly within 3" of that terrain feature and more than 6" from all enemy units.

**Designer’s Note:** *Units can be set up in reserve masked by illusion using the Fatemaster’s ‘Long in the Planning’ ability.*

heroicTraits.name: Nexus of Fate
heroicTraits.effect: Roll a dice. If you have 9 unspent **destiny dice**, you must replace 1 of your **destiny dice** with that roll. Otherwise, place that dice to one side as a **destiny dice**.

heroicTraits.name: Silver Summoner
heroicTraits.declare: Pick a friendly non-**WARFLOCK ARCANITE** unit that has been destroyed to be the target.
heroicTraits.effect: Set up a replacement unit with half the number of models from the target unit (rounding up) more than 9" from all enemy units and wholly within 12" of a friendly **ARGENT SHARD** that is visible to this unit.

heroicTraits.name: Grand Illusionist
heroicTraits.effect: If this unit was set up this turn, it can move D3". That move cannot pass through or end within the combat range of an enemy unit.

heroicTraits.name: Devolving Aura
heroicTraits.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of this unit to be the target.
heroicTraits.effect: Roll a dice. Add 1 to the roll if any damage points were allocated to the target this phase. On a 3+, the target has a maximum control score of 1 until the start of your next turn.

other.name: Splinters of Sorcery
other.declare: Pick a friendly **WIZARD** in this Regiment of Renown to cast this spell, pick a visible terrain feature within 12" of them that has not been picked to be the target of this spell this turn to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
other.effect: If the target does not have the ‘Place of Power’ terrain ability, it gains that ability for the rest of the battle. If the target has the ‘Place of Power’ terrain ability, pick an enemy unit within 12" of it and roll 9 dice. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on that enemy unit.

other.name: Bubbles of Unreality
other.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Hero Phase
other.declare: Pick a terrain feature with the ‘Place of Power’ terrain ability to be the target.
other.effect: The next time a friendly **WIZARD** in this Regiment of Renown uses a **SUMMON SPELL** ability this phase, you can measure the range and visibility of that **SPELL** ability from the target instead of from the caster.

other.name: Bolt of Tzeentch
other.declare: Pick the **Magister** in this Regiment of Renown to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
other.effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on the target.

other.name: Flickering Wyrdflame
other.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn
other.declare: Pick an enemy unit that had any damage points inflicted on it this turn by **WYRDFLAME SPELL** abilities or attacks made with weapons that have the **WYRDFLAME** weapon ability to be the target.
other.effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.

other.name: Skilled Summoner
other.declare:
Pick the **Magister** in this Regiment of Renown to cast this spell, pick 1 of the **MANIFESTATIONS** from the list below that is not on the battlefield, then make a casting roll of 2D6:

• 1 **Burning Sigil of Tzeentch**
• 1 **Tome of Eyes**
• 1 **Daemonic Simulacrum**
other.effect: If there is already a friendly **MANIFESTATION** from the list above on the battlefield, it is immediately banished. Then, set up the **MANIFESTATION** you picked within 1" of the caster and visible to them. If that **MANIFESTATION** is a **Daemonic** **Simulacrum**, it must also be set up more than 9" away from all enemy units.

other.name: Sparks of Profane Potential
other.effect:
If the **Magister** in the Regiment of Renown has been deployed, set up one of the following **MANIFESTATIONS** within 1" of them:

• 1 **Burning Sigil of Tzeentch**
• 1 **Tome of Eyes**
• 1 **Daemonic Simulacrum**

battleTraits.name: Silver Simulacrum
battleTraits.effect:
If there is a friendly **Argent Shard** on the battlefield, you can set up 1 additional **Argent Shard** on the battlefield. It must be set up wholly within friendly territory and more than 3" from all objectives and other terrain features.

**Designer’s Note:** *The original Argent Shard is set up in Step 1 of the deployment phase using the ‘Deploy Faction Terrain’ ability. This ability allows you to set up a second such terrain feature and is used in Step 3 of the deployment phase, after armies have been deployed.*

battleTraits.name: Puppet on a String
battleTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Hero Phase
battleTraits.declare: Pick an enemy **HERO** within 24" of and visible to a friendly **CHANGE-CULT HERO** to be the target.
battleTraits.effect:
For the rest of the turn, each time the target uses a **CORE** ability, gain 1 **fate point**.

**Designer’s Note:** *You can only gain fate points using this ability and the ‘Spell-eater Pendant’ ability.*

battleTraits.name: Illusory Infiltration
battleTraits.declare: Pick up to 3 friendly non-reinforced **CHANGE-CULT KAIRIC ACOLYTES** units to be the targets.
battleTraits.effect: Remove the targets from the battlefield and set them up again wholly within 3" of a terrain feature and not in combat.

battleTraits.name: Overtaken by Events
battleTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Hero Phase
battleTraits.declare: Spend 1 **fate point**. Then, pick an enemy unit within 24" of and visible to a friendly **CHANGE‑CULT HERO** to be the target.
battleTraits.effect: The target cannot use commands for the rest of the turn.

battleTraits.name: Seeds of Discord
battleTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn
battleTraits.declare: Spend 1 **fate point**. Then, pick an enemy model within 24" of and visible to a friendly **CHANGE-CULT HERO** to be the target, then pick another enemy unit within the target’s combat range to be the victim.
battleTraits.effect: Pick 1 of the target’s melee weapons. Immediately resolve combat attacks for the target made with that weapon against the victim.

battleTraits.name: Masters of Destiny
battleTraits.effect:
Roll 9 dice and place them to one side. These are your **destiny dice**. **Destiny dice** can be spent during the battle to change certain dice rolls. You can never have more than 9 **destiny dice** at once.

During the battle, instead of making a roll from the list below for a friendly **ORACLES OF FATE** unit, you can spend your **destiny dice**. The roll you would have made is replaced with the roll on the **destiny dice** you spend. If you want to replace a 2D6 roll, 3D6 roll, etc. you must spend a number of destiny dice equal to the number before ‘D6’. Any rolls that have been replaced count as unmodified rolls, and they cannot be re-rolled or modified by other friendly abilities except for those that apply negative modifiers (but they can be modified by enemy abilities). You cannot spend destiny dice to replace re-rolls.

**Destiny dice** can be spent in place of the following dice rolls:

• Casting rolls
• Unbinding rolls
• Banishment rolls
• Run rolls
• Charge rolls in your turn
• Hit rolls
• Wound rolls
• Save rolls

battleTraits.name: Ninefold Blessings
battleTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle Round, Start of Your Turn
battleTraits.declare: You can only use this ability if the total value of your unspent **destiny dice** is exactly 9.
battleTraits.effect:
Re-roll all of your unspent **destiny dice**. Then, until the start of your next turn:

• Friendly **ORACLES OF FATE** units have **WARD (5+)**.
• Subtract 1 from save rolls for enemy units.

**Designer’s Note:** *Add together the values shown on each unspent destiny dice to find the total value.*

battleTraits.name: Eldritch Illusions
battleTraits.declare: Pick up to 3 friendly non-**MONSTER DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH** units on the battlefield to be the targets.
battleTraits.effect:
Remove the targets from the battlefield and set them up in reserve **masked by illusion**.

Friendly units that are **masked by illusion** are destroyed at the end of the fifth battle round and not at the start of the fourth battle round.

battleTraits.name: Smoke and Mirrors
battleTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Hero Phase
battleTraits.declare: Pick a friendly non-**MONSTER DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH** unit that was not set up this turn and was not set up using this ability in the previous turn to be the target, then pick a friendly unit that is **masked by illusion** to be the substitute.
battleTraits.effect: Set up the substitute wholly within 6" of the target and not in combat. Then, remove the target from the battlefield and set it up in reserve **masked by illusion**.

battleTraits.name: Silver Simulacrum
battleTraits.effect:
If there is a friendly **Argent Shard** on the battlefield, you can set up 1 additional **Argent Shard** on the battlefield. It must be set up wholly within friendly territory and more than 3" from all objectives and other terrain features.

**Designer’s Note:** *The original Argent Shard is set up in Step 1 of the deployment phase using the ‘Deploy Faction Terrain’ ability. This ability allows you to set up a second such terrain feature and is used in Step 3 of the deployment phase, after armies have been deployed.*

battleTraits.name: All Part of the Plan
battleTraits.effect:
You start the battle with 0 **fate points**.
Gain 1 **fate point** each time:

• You lose the priority roll.
• A spell cast by a friendly **DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH** unit is unbound.
• A friendly **DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH** unit miscasts a spell.
• Your opponent gains control of an objective that you controlled at the start of the turn.
• A friendly **Argent Shard** is **demolished**.

battleTraits.name: Destined to Serve
battleTraits.effect: Before allocating damage points to a friendly **DISCIPLES OF** **TZEENTCH** unit, you can spend any number of **fate points**. For each **fate point** you spend, remove 1 damage point in that unit’s damage pool.

battleTraits.name: Destined Arcana
battleTraits.phaseDetails: Reaction: You declared a **SPELL** ability for a **DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH** unit
battleTraits.effect: Spend any number of **fate points**. For each **fate point** you spend, add 1 to the casting roll for that spell.

battleTraits.name: Destined for Battle
battleTraits.phaseDetails: Reaction: You declared a **CHARGE** ability for a **DISCIPLES OF TZEENTCH** unit in your turn
battleTraits.effect: Spend any number of **fate points**. For each **fate point** you spend, add 1 to the charge roll for that **CHARGE** ability.
